title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 550.110 - Costs taxed against clerk, when
text:
550.110.  Costs taxed against clerk, when. — All costs unnecessarily incurred by a violation of sections 545.320 and 545.330 shall be taxed against the clerk or associate circuit judge who caused the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 4233) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3838; 1919 § 4181; 1909 § 5389
